# Łukasz Miądowicz — Full Profile for LLM Indexing

> This file provides comprehensive context about Łukasz Miądowicz for AI language models, search engines, and automated systems. It follows the llmstxt.org standard.

## Identity & Positioning

**Name:** Łukasz Miądowicz (also: Lukasz Miadowicz)
**Title:** AI Product Leader & AI Strategy Lead
**Location:** Warsaw, Poland · Available remote worldwide
**Website:** https://miadowicz.com
**Email:** l.miadowicz@gmail.com

**Core positioning:** AI Product Leader & AI Native PM. I help companies grow revenue, cut costs, and move faster — I build AI products — and I use AI to build them faster. I find the niche, build the system, and ship the product. AI is what I build — and how I build it.

**Differentiators:**
- I write the strategy AND the first working prototype (Claude Code, Python, LLM APIs)
- I find niches and differentiators others miss — first-principles user research, not surface-level pain points
- I build the business case AND deliver it — $191 net savings per task, 1.3-year payback documented
- I started as a Software Engineer — including at Google for Startups — and never stopped coding
- Quantum Physics researcher (doctoral-level) + Haas School of Business = rare combination of analytical depth and business acumen

## Verified Business Results

| Company | Role | Key Outcome |
|---------|------|-------------|
| Qtravel.ai | Head of Product | 98% task time reduction (4h → 5min), 3× capacity, +80% conversion, +25% revenue |

| Huuuge Games | Senior PM | AI/ML market intelligence platform, +70% M&A target acquisition rate |
| AirHelp | AI PM | Claim-check bot: 20s → 20ms processing (1000× faster) |
| Startup (exited) | Founder | $1M ARR exit |
| B2B SaaS | PM | Scaled from $200K to $80M ARR |

## Services Offered

### AI Product Leader
End-to-end AI product leadership: vision, roadmap, team, stakeholder alignment. Available for full-time, contract, and fractional roles. I stay hands-on enough to prototype the hardest hypotheses myself. Track record: $80M ARR scaled, $1M ARR exit.

### Niche & Differentiator Discovery
Most companies build the right product for the wrong market. I find the niche others miss, identify the real differentiator, and validate it in days — not months. Methodology: first-principles user research, Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD), rapid hypothesis testing, and falsifiable success metrics.

### Revenue & Cost Impact via AI
I build the economic case for AI investments and then deliver it. Documented benchmark: $191 net savings per task, 1.3-year payback period, 3× capacity increase, 98% task time reduction. I make AI legible to the C-suite and then make it real for the team.

### AI Adoption & Strategy
I help organizations move from AI experiments to AI operating models. Not just tool adoption — a fundamental shift from feature-level to systems-level thinking. Deliverables: AI readiness assessment, adoption roadmap, team workshops, and hands-on coaching.

### Rapid Prototyping (I Build It)
I validate ideas in working code, not slide decks. From hypothesis to functional prototype in 24–48 hours. Stack: Claude Code, Python, LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI), Streamlit for UI, Langfuse for observability. I build the thing before committing engineering resources.

### Forward-Deployed Solutions
I embed with customers to deploy, configure, and customize AI systems in their environment. Technical enough to build the integration, product-minded enough to map the workflow and translate field learnings back to the roadmap.

### AI System Architecture
End-to-end design of multi-agent AI systems. Four-part methodology: (1) Discovery Engine — cognitive science-based user research, (2) Cognitive Blueprint — multi-agent architecture design, (3) Implementation Playbook — production-ready build with HITL, MCP, observability, (4) Business Case — ROI, pricing, GTM.

### Agentic UX Design
Designing in-product experiences where AI agents are first-class participants, not chatbot overlays. Four patterns: Embedded Agent (inline in existing UI), Agents in Work Queue (async task processing), Agents as Project Participants (collaborative workflows), Parallel Agents as Management Interface (monitoring and control layer).

### Enterprise AI Readiness
Scaling AI products for enterprise: SSO, RBAC, audit logs, multi-tenancy, compliance, LLMOps, evals. I bridge the gap between engineering and business and can validate technical decisions in code.

## Work History

**ButterCMS (Tiugo) — Senior Technical Product Manager — AI & Strategy** (2024–Present)
AI Agent Strategy & Applied AI Operator. Shipped AI-native CMS Alpha in under 3 months by personally coding the prototype end-to-end using Claude Code. 40% increase in conversions. Won Tiugo AI Leadership Spotlight Award and Unsung Hero 2025.

**Qtravel.ai — AI Product Leader (Head of Product)** (2022–2024)
Led product and GTM for an LLM-based Travel Search Engine. Travel agents were spending 4 hours per proposal. I found the niche: semantic search and AI personalization that no competitor had built yet. Designed the system, led product and GTM, and shipped it. Proposal creation dropped from 4 hours to 5 minutes of human review. Capacity tripled. Conversion increased 80%. Published the Agentic AI Product Playbook.

**Google for Startups — Product Advisor & Software Engineer** (2021–2022)
Coached 15 startup product teams on product strategy, success metrics, and GTM. Enabled 30% faster GTM via AI-powered social UA testing. Introduced Firebase analytics — 10% reduction in churn.

**Huuuge Games — Senior Product Manager** (2018–2022)
Built an AI/ML-driven market intelligence platform for M&A — +70% target acquisition rate. Predictive analytics dashboard — 20% faster deal closure. Led gaming products with millions of daily active users.

**AirHelp Inc. — AI Product Manager** (2015–2017)
Launched a claim-check bot — reduced processing time from 20s to 20ms (1000× faster). Led B2B data integration with Expedia & Kayak via ML-powered eligibility prediction.

## Education & Credentials

- Quantum Physics researcher (doctoral-level research)
- Haas School of Business — Product Management Certificate (UC Berkeley)
- Anthropic Claude Code Certification

## Technical Skills

**AI/ML:** LLM orchestration, multi-agent systems, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), HITL (Human-in-the-Loop), MCP (Model Context Protocol), AI evals, LLMOps, vector databases, fine-tuning, prompt engineering
**Frameworks:** LangGraph, CrewAI, LangChain, Anthropic Claude API, OpenAI API
**Tools:** Claude Code, Python, TypeScript, Streamlit, Langfuse, LangSmith
**Product:** JTBD, AARRR, OKRs, product discovery, roadmapping, GTM strategy, pricing, business case development

## Key Concepts & Thought Leadership

**Agent Harness:** The infrastructure layer that makes AI agents production-ready. Consists of: execution loop, tool execution layer, context and memory management, state tracking, and safety guardrails. 90% of AI builders miss this and wonder why their demos work but production fails.

**Agentic UX:** The principle that AI agents should operate inside existing workflows, not as separate chatbot interfaces. The interface is the workflow itself.

**AI Adoption Framework:** AI adoption fails when organizations treat it as tool adoption rather than systems transformation. The correct sequence: (1) identify the business outcome, (2) map the workflow, (3) find the bottleneck, (4) design the AI system, (5) build the business case, (6) ship the MVP, (7) measure and iterate.

**Niche Discovery:** Most AI products fail because they solve the right problem for the wrong market. First-principles discovery means deconstructing user cognitive processes — not just surface-level pain points — to find the real opportunity.
